goal: Turn the best shortlisted discussions into a small number of credible visible interactions.
workflow: Re-open the post and confirm it is still available and relevant.
Re-read the post immediately before drafting.
Prepare one short German comment using config/comment-style.md.
Show the post URL, author, and exact comment to the human.
Wait for explicit approval for that exact comment.
Submit once, verify it appears, and record the result.
If approval is not given, do not submit.
success_after_one_week: At least 3 replies from authors or relevant professionals.
At least 2 repeated interactions from the same target audience.
At least 1 qualified conversation or invitation to continue the discussion.
failure_interpretation: High impressions but wrong audience: narrow sources and topics.
No replies: comments are generic, late, or posted under weak accounts.
Replies but no profile interest: profile positioning may be unclear.
No useful posts found: LinkedIn is a credibility channel, not the main acquisition channel.
